bridge_functions.name: FirebasePnv.GetVerificationSupportInfo
bridge_functions.description: Check whether the device/SIM(s) support Firebase PNV. Result is delivered asynchronously via the SupportInfoRetrieved event.

bridge_functions.name: FirebasePnv.GetVerifiedPhoneNumber
bridge_functions.description: Run the full phone-number verification flow (Credential Manager consent + Firebase PNV backend). Result is delivered asynchronously via the Verified / VerificationFailed events.
